body:
- Fix User model with `winRate` index for optimized leaderboard queries.
- Fix Match and MatchReplay models matching `/api/matches` response structures.
- Create SavePoint model with strict Buff and Upgrade sub-schemas mapped from `buff.ts`.
- Fix Achievement model for static system achievements.
- Ensure all schemas use English JSDoc comments per language conventions.
title: fix(models): setup complete mongoose schemas aligned with design docs
